message:
test(e2e): add mobile responsive layout E2E tests

- Add mobile-helpers.ts with viewport, touch, and navigation utilities
- Add viewports.spec.ts testing responsive layouts across 6 viewports
- Add navigation.spec.ts testing hamburger menu and bottom tab bar
- Add touch.spec.ts testing touch targets, swipe gestures, safe areas

83 tests covering:
- Viewport switching (mobile/tablet/desktop)
- Hamburger menu open/close/navigation
- Bottom tab bar visibility and navigation
- Touch target minimum sizes (44px)
- Horizontal overflow detection
- Sticky header behavior
- Safe area inset handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
